Please keep your debug/trace logging additions elsewhere (e.g. inside method bodies you're already touching, log call wrappers) and avoid editing those same lines/the new tick() method so our diffs don't collide. content:
type: DONE
my_files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
note: Idle-timeout feature implemented: added idle_timeout_s param, self._last_chunk_ts (updated via time.time() right after chunk_message extraction in receive()), and a new tick() method placed between receive() and flush(). tick() emits StreamResponse(..., chunk='') on timeout (tries is_last_chunk=True, falls back via TypeError if that field doesn't exist yet) and unconditionally resets stream_start/stream_end/cache_hit/field_start_queue/field_end_queue/_last_chunk_ts. Tests pass (tests/streaming/test_streaming.py). Wrote patch.txt. All clear for you to add your logging additions in the regions we agreed on.
